languages.text: "Войска Гапраков — насмешка. Их разбили в два счета. Такие вассалы дому фон Валанциус не нужны — считайте, что династии оказали услугу, добив червя, что приполз к вратам своего господина не предложить военную мощь, а молить о ней. Я не прошу вашего понимания: чтобы оценить значимость такого поступка требуется немалый опыт".

traits.locale_text: "Войска Гапраков — насмешка. Их разбили в два счёта. Такие вассалы дому фон Валанциус не нужны — считайте, что династии оказали услугу, добив червя, что приполз к вратам своего господина не предложить военную мощь, а молить о ней. Я не прошу вашего понимания: чтобы оценить значимость такого поступка требуется немалый опыт".

languages.text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."
languages.original_text: "Войска Гапраков — насмешка. Их разбили в два счета. Такие вассалы дому фон Валанциус не нужны — считайте, что династии оказали услугу, добив червя, что приполз к вратам своего господина не предложить военную мощь, а молить о ней. Я не прошу вашего понимания: чтобы оценить значимость такого поступка требуется немалый опыт".

House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

"The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

languages.text: “贾帕克家的那点兵力，简直不堪一击。他们没撑多久就被打垮了。冯·瓦兰修斯王朝不需要这样的附庸。事实上，我算是替王朝清理了一个麻烦，那条虫子爬到主人门前，不是来提供战力，而是来乞求保护的。我不指望你能理解：要领会此举的深意，需要相当深厚的阅历。”
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家的那点兵力，简直不堪一击。他们没撑多久就被打垮了。冯·瓦兰修斯王朝不需要这样的附庸。事实上，我算是替王朝清理了一个麻烦，那条虫子爬到主人门前，不是来提供战力，而是来乞求保护的。我不指望你能理解：要领会此举的深意，需要相当深厚的阅历。”

languages.text: « Les troupes des Gaprak étaient ridicules. Il n'a pas fallu bien longtemps à l'ennemi pour les mettre en déroute. La maison von Valancius n'a pas besoin de vassaux de cet acabit. J'estime même avoir rendu service à la dynastie en achevant le vermisseau qui avait rampé jusqu'aux portes de son maître, non pas pour nous offrir sa puissance militaire, mais pour quémander la nôtre. Je ne m'attends pas à ce que vous compreniez, il faut une expérience considérable pour apprécier un tel acte à sa juste valeur. »
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: « Les troupes des Gaprak étaient ridicules. Il n'a pas fallu bien longtemps à l'ennemi pour les mettre en déroute. La maison von Valancius n'a pas besoin de vassaux de cet acabit. J'estime même avoir rendu service à la dynastie en achevant le vermisseau qui avait rampé jusqu'aux portes de son maître, non pas pour nous offrir sa puissance militaire, mais pour quémander la nôtre. Je ne m'attends pas à ce que vous compreniez, il faut une expérience considérable pour apprécier un tel acte à sa juste valeur. »

languages.text: "Gaprak güçleri gülünç boyuttaydı. Göz açıp kapayıncaya kadar bozguna uğratıldılar. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin böyle vasallara ihtiyacı yok. Aslında efendisinin kapılarına askerî güç sunmak için değil, dilenmek için sürünen o solucanın işini bitirerek hanedanlığa iyilikte bulundum. Anlayış beklemiyorum: Böyle bir eylemin önemini takdir etmek, önemli bir tecrübe gerektirir."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak güçleri gülünç boyuttaydı. Göz açıp kapayıncaya kadar bozguna uğratıldılar. Von Valancius Hanesi'nin böyle vasallara ihtiyacı yok. Aslında efendisinin kapılarına askerî güç sunmak için değil, dilenmek için sürünen o solucanın işini bitirerek hanedanlığa iyilikte bulundum. Anlayış beklemiyorum: Böyle bir eylemin önemini takdir etmek, önemli bir tecrübe gerektirir."

languages.text: «Las fuerzas Gaprak eran irrisorias. Fueron derrotadas al instante. La casa von Valancius no necesita vasallos como esos. Es más, le he hecho un favor a la dinastía rematando al gusano que se ha arrastrado ante las puertas de su amo, no para ofrecer poderío militar, sino para suplicarlo. No le pido que lo comprenda: hace falta una amplia experiencia para apreciar la importancia de semejante acción».
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: «Las fuerzas Gaprak eran irrisorias. Fueron derrotadas al instante. La casa von Valancius no necesita vasallos como esos. Es más, le he hecho un favor a la dinastía rematando al gusano que se ha arrastrado ante las puertas de su amo, no para ofrecer poderío militar, sino para suplicarlo. No le pido que lo comprenda: hace falta una amplia experiencia para apreciar la importancia de semejante acción».

languages.text: "Die Truppen der Gaprak waren lächerlich. Sie wurden in kürzester Zeit aufgerieben. Haus von Valancius braucht keine derartigen Vasallen ... tatsächlich habe ich der Dynastie einen Gefallen getan, als ich den Wurm getötet habe, der an den Toren seines Meisters um militärische Unterstützung bettelte, anstatt sie selbst zu stellen. Ich suche nicht Euer Verständnis: Es erfordert beträchtliche Erfahrung, die Bedeutung einer solchen Tat anzuerkennen."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: "Die Truppen der Gaprak waren lächerlich. Sie wurden in kürzester Zeit aufgerieben. Haus von Valancius braucht keine derartigen Vasallen ... tatsächlich habe ich der Dynastie einen Gefallen getan, als ich den Wurm getötet habe, der an den Toren seines Meisters um militärische Unterstützung bettelte, anstatt sie selbst zu stellen. Ich suche nicht Euer Verständnis: Es erfordert beträchtliche Erfahrung, die Bedeutung einer solchen Tat anzuerkennen."

languages.text: 「ギャプラク軍は笑えるほど弱かった。あっという間に壊滅した。ヴァランシウス家はそんな家臣はいらない。むしろ、主の門まで這い寄って軍事力を求める虫を、私は家臣を終わらせて恩を施した。君が理解してくれる必要はない。このような行為の意義を理解するには、相当な経験が必要だ。」
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces were laughable. They were routed in no time at all. House von Valancius has no need of such vassals — in fact, I have done the dynasty a favour by finishing off the worm that crawled to the gates of its master, not to offer military might, but to beg for it. I do not seek your understanding: it takes considerable experience to appreciate the significance of such a deed."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラク軍は笑えるほど弱かった。あっという間に壊滅した。ヴァランシウス家はそんな家臣はいらない。むしろ、主の門まで這い寄って軍事力を求める虫を、私は家臣を終わらせて恩を施した。君が理解してくれる必要はない。このような行為の意義を理解するには、相当な経験が必要だ。」
